disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: The repository directs contributors to work on a branch or fork and submit a pull request for review. The maintainer-set behavior is recorded on issue #595. No AI-assistance prohibition, CLA, or DCO requirement was found in the inspected instructions.
